app.name: ReWindowsMusic Mobile
app.description: 🎵 ReWindowsMusic – Ultimate Music Player for Windows Phone 8.1 ReWindowsMusic is a powerful, lightweight, and feature‑rich music player built specifically for Windows Phone 8.1 using pure HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (no WinJS dependencies). It delivers a smooth, touch‑friendly experience even on older devices. ✨ Key Features 🎧 Play Local & Online Music – Load tracks from an XML feed, JSON API, or external sources. 📀 Smart Playlists – Create, edit, and save playlists locally (stored in localStorage). 🎙️ Podcast Player (PodCats) – Stream podcast episodes from an XML feed. 📂 ReOpenTracks – Load and play a huge JSON‑based music collection (150+ tracks). 🔍 Real‑time Search – Filter songs, podcasts, or tracks by title or artist.

app.name: ReWindowsStore Mobile
app.description: 📱 ReWinStore Mobile – Description ReWinStore Mobile is a lightweight version of our app store, specifically designed for Windows Phone devices. It brings the full power of ReWinStore to the mobile platform with an optimized interface and smooth performance. 🔹 Key Features of ReWinStore Mobile: Windows Phone native design – clean, touch-friendly layout adapted for smaller screens. Fast navigation – swipe between sections, tap to download. Full app catalog – access all apps and games available in the main ReWinStore. One‑tap download – open download links directly in your browser. My Apps list – keep track of apps you’ve downloaded, stored locally. Lightweight and fast – works flawlessly on older Windows Phone hardware. 💡 Note: ReWinStore Mobile is available via the "Mobile Mode" button in the left menu of the main ReWinStore application.
